title: Apocalypse Minimap Hud
description: Added Apocalypse-Rebooted's Difficulty to Xaero's-Minimap Info Display
body:
### Download file name format description:

Example: [1.20.1] AMH v0.0.3 (**Apo** _v3.x.x_, **Xaero** _25.3.x_)

**Apo** in parentheses indicates supported Apocalypse mod versions. For example, this one _supports Apocalypse mod v3.x.x_, including v3.9.8

**Xaero** in parentheses indicates supported versions of Xaero's Minimap. This one, for example, _supports Xaero's Minimap v25.3.x_, including v25.3.10

### 📖 About:
This was originally a mod for my Modpack that integrated [Apocalypse-Rebooted](https://modrinth.com/mod/apocalypse-rebooted)'s difficulty display into [Xaero's Minimap](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-minimap).

Currently only Xaero's Minimap and Xaero's Minimap (Fair-Play) are supported, but more minimaps will be added in the future.

![Info display](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/de6792bec446f8f418187c491c231e9fb08d87ab.png)

If you have the [Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) and [Catalogue](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/catalogue) installed, then you can easily modify the configuration of the Difficulty display on the configuration screen.

![Config screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1570ae5f0e3572b95234dc2f9f3fd9589c7d5ef9.png)

See the full picture in [Gallery](https://modrinth.com/mod/apocalypseminimaphud/gallery).

This mod is part of my Minimap Hud series, which includes:

- [Project Minimap Hud](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/project-minimap-hud) ( ProjectE EMC display )
- **Apocalypse Minimap Hud** (This mod)

### 🔨 Required Dependencies:
- [Apocalypse-Rebooted](https://modrinth.com/mod/apocalypse-rebooted)
- [Xaero's Minimap](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-minimap) or [Xaero's Minimap (Fair-Play)](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-minimap-fair)
